name: alpha3
formula: rolling_sum((where(close==delay(close,1), 0, close-(where(close>delay(close,1), minimum(low, delay(close,1)), maximum(high, delay(close,1)))))),6)

name: alpha50
formula: rolling_sum((where((high+low)<=(delay(high,1)+delay(low,1)), 0, maximum(abs(high-delay(high,1)), abs(low-delay(low,1))))),12)/(rolling_sum((where((high+low)<=(delay(high,1)+delay(low,1)), 0, maximum(abs(high-delay(high,1)), abs(low-delay(low,1))))),12)+rolling_sum((where((high+low)>=(delay(high,1)+delay(low,1)), 0, maximum(abs(high-delay(high,1)), abs(low-delay(low,1))))),12))-rolling_sum((where((high+low)>=(delay(high,1)+delay(low,1)), 0, maximum(abs(high-delay(high,1)), abs(low-delay(low,1))))),12)/(rolling_sum((where((high+low)>=(delay(high,1)+delay(low,1)), 0, maximum(abs(high-delay(high,1)), abs(low-delay(low,1))))),12)+rolling_sum((where((high+low)<=(delay(high,1)+delay(low,1)), 0, maximum(abs(high-delay(high,1)), abs(low-delay(low,1))))),12))

name: alpha59
formula: rolling_sum((where(close==delay(close,1), 0, close-(where(close>delay(close,1), minimum(low, delay(close,1)), maximum(high, delay(close,1)))))),20)

name: alpha77
formula: minimum(rank(decay_linear(((((high + low) / 2) + high) -(vwap + high)), 20)), rank(decay_linear(rolling_corr(((high + low) / 2), rolling_mean(volume,40), 3), 6)))
raw: MIN(RANK(DECAYLINEAR(((((HIGH + LOW) / 2) + HIGH) -(VWAP + HIGH)), 20)),RANK(DECAYLINEAR(CORR(((HIGH + LOW) / 2), MEAN(VOLUME,40), 3), 6)))

name: alpha172
formula: rolling_mean(abs(rolling_sum(where((ld>0 & ld>hd), ld, 0,14))*100/rolling_sum(tr,14)-rolling_sum(where((hd>0 &hd>ld), hd, 0,14))*100/rolling_sum(tr,14))/(rolling_sum(where((ld>0 & ld>hd), ld, 0,14))*100/rolling_sum(tr,14)+rolling_sum(where((hd>0 &hd>ld), hd, 0,14))*100/rolling_sum(tr,14))*100,6)

name: alpha186
formula: (rolling_mean(abs(rolling_sum(where((ld>0 & ld>hd), ld, 0,14))*100/rolling_sum(tr,14)-rolling_sum(where((hd>0 &hd>ld), hd, 0,14))*100/rolling_sum(tr,14))/(rolling_sum(where((ld>0 &ld>hd), ld, 0,14))*100/rolling_sum(tr,14)+rolling_sum(where((hd>0 &hd>ld), hd, 0,14))*100/rolling_sum(tr,14))*100,6)+delay(rolling_mean(abs(rolling_sum(where((ld>0 &ld>hd), ld, 0,14))*100/rolling_sum(tr,14)-rolling_sum(where((hd>0 & hd>ld), hd, 0,14))*100/rolling_sum(tr,14))/(rolling_sum(where((ld>0&ld>hd), ld, 0,14))*100/rolling_sum(tr,14)+rolling_sum(where((hd>0 & hd>ld), hd, 0,14))*100/rolling_sum(tr,14))*100,6),6))/2
